caption: A man with a pointed, grey, textured wig and glasses is seated in a studio setting, speaking into a professional microphone. He wears a white button-down shirt with a brown bowtie and brown suspenders. He has over-ear headphones on and a small clip-on microphone attached to his chest. The background consists of a wall covered in framed photographs and a clothing rack with garments and hangers. In the foreground, a logo is visible on the left featuring a microphone and the text "PODCAST" below "BOSS TALK 101". On the right side of the scene, the text "BOSS TALK 101" is displayed again. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, gesturing slightly with his hands and moving his mouth as he speaks, while the camera angle and background remain static.
